summary: Iteration 39: Smart Attendance Handling - All features verified. Backend 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend all tests passed. Ghost shift detection (>14h), staff self-correction flow, manager approval workflow, and terminal auto-close all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py Lines 36-39: MAX_SHIFT_HOURS=14 constant defines ghost shift threshold
attendance.py Lines 67-82: _detect_ghost_shift() helper returns ghost info if elapsed >14h
attendance.py Lines 123-139: PIN-based clock auto-closes ghost shifts with flag_reason='ghost_shift_auto_closed'
attendance.py Lines 221-228: clock-me returns action='ghost_shift_pending' when ghost exists (BLOCKER)
attendance.py Lines 283-337: resolve-ghost endpoint validates claimed time (must be after clock_in, <=14h)
attendance.py Lines 370-380: pending-adjustments endpoint returns records with pending_manager_approval=true
attendance.py Lines 383-430: approve-adjustment sets manager_approved_time, clears pending_manager_approval
attendance.py Lines 554-559: dashboard-stats includes pending_adjustments_count for admin
StaffClockIn.js Lines 127-174: Ghost shift intercept UI with 'Missing Clock-Out' card, datetime picker, Submit button
StaffClockIn.js Lines 89-106: handleResolveGhost calls attendanceAPI.resolveGhost with claimed time
AdminDashboard.js Lines 319-366: Pending Approvals widget with Approve button for each record
api.js Lines 593-607: resolveGhost, getPendingAdjustments, approveAdjustment methods added
seed_data_creation: Created ghost shift test records (20h old open attendance) for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified Smart Attendance Handling: (1) Ghost shift detection triggers when open attendance record exceeds 14 hours. (2) Staff sees 'Missing Clock-Out' card on /heva-ops/clock with datetime picker to enter claimed finish time. (3) Clock In button is hidden (BLOCKER) until ghost is resolved. (4) POST /api/attendance/resolve-ghost validates claimed time (must be after clock_in, <=14h). (5) Admin dashboard shows 'Pending Approvals' widget with Approve button. (6) PUT /api/attendance/{id}/approve-adjustment sets manager_approved_time and clears pending flag. (7) PIN-based terminal clock auto-closes ghost shifts with flag_reason='ghost_shift_auto_closed'. (8) Audit trail fields: auto_close_time, staff_claimed_time, manager_approved_time stored on attendance record.

clock_me_normal_works.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock-me with JWT returns clock_in or clock_out action

my_status_ghost_detection.evidence: GET /api/attendance/my-status returns ghost_shift_pending:true with ghost_shift object when >14h open record exists

clock_me_blocked_by_ghost.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock-me returns action='ghost_shift_pending' when ghost shift exists

resolve_ghost_saves_claimed_time.evidence: POST /api/attendance/resolve-ghost saves staff_claimed_time and sets pending_manager_approval:true

resolve_ghost_rejects_before_clock_in.evidence: POST /api/attendance/resolve-ghost returns 400 if claimed time is before clock_in

resolve_ghost_rejects_exceeds_14h.evidence: POST /api/attendance/resolve-ghost returns 400 if claimed shift exceeds 14 hours

pending_adjustments_admin_only.evidence: GET /api/attendance/pending-adjustments returns 403 for non-admin, returns list for admin

approve_adjustment_works.evidence: PUT /api/attendance/{id}/approve-adjustment sets manager_approved_time, approved:true, clears pending_manager_approval

dashboard_stats_pending_count.evidence: GET /api/attendance/dashboard-stats includes pending_adjustments_count for admin (0 for staff)

terminal_auto_closes_ghost.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock (PIN-based) auto-closes ghost shifts and allows new clock-in

frontend_ghost_shift_card.evidence: StaffClockIn page shows 'Missing Clock-Out' card with datetime picker when ghost detected

frontend_submit_finish_time_btn.evidence: 'Submit Finish Time' button visible and calls resolve-ghost API

frontend_clock_in_hidden_blocker.evidence: Clock In button is hidden when ghost shift is pending

frontend_pending_approvals_widget.evidence: Admin dashboard shows 'Pending Approvals' widget with Approve button when pending adjustments exist

frontend_approve_button_works.evidence: Approve button calls approveAdjustment API and removes record from widget
